name: Glade Cyber Snow Scene Render
description: Render moon, snow-capped mountains, trees, river, and neon snowfall background
code: var ctx = drawingContext; var w = dimensionContext.width; var h = dimensionContext.height; var g = ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,h); g.addColorStop(0,'#040714'); g.addColorStop(0.42,'#120a2a'); g.addColorStop(1,'#07131e'); ctx.fillStyle=g; ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h); var moonX=w*0.78, moonY=h*0.18, moonR=h*0.08; var mg=ctx.createRadialGradient(moonX,moonY,0,moonX,moonY,moonR*2.8); mg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(210,235,255,0.75)'); mg.addColorStop(0.35,'rgba(180,210,255,0.35)'); mg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(140,170,255,0)'); ctx.fillStyle=mg; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(moonX,moonY,moonR*2.8,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(235,245,255,0.95)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(moonX,moonY,moonR,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); function m(x1,y1,x2,y2,x3,y3,f,s,n){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x1,y1);ctx.lineTo(x2,y2);ctx.lineTo(x3,y3);ctx.closePath();ctx.fillStyle=f;ctx.fill();ctx.strokeStyle=s;ctx.lineWidth=2;ctx.stroke();var sxL=x2-(x2-x1)*0.26,sxR=x2+(x3-x2)*0.26,sy=y2+(y1-y2)*0.24;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x2,y2+2);ctx.lineTo(sxL,sy);ctx.lineTo(sxR,sy);ctx.closePath();ctx.fillStyle=n;ctx.fill();} var hz=h*0.70; m(w*0.54,hz+6,w*0.80,h*0.44,w*1.02,hz+6,'rgba(14,28,52,0.96)','rgba(50,255,220,0.2)','rgba(232,244,255,0.82)'); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(6,17,24,0.96)'; ctx.fillRect(0,hz,w,h-hz); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(w*0.10,h); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(w*0.34,h*0.78,w*0.52,h*0.90); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(w*0.68,h*1.01,w*0.90,h*0.84); ctx.lineTo(w*0.98,h); ctx.closePath(); var rv=ctx.createLinearGradient(w*0.10,h*0.78,w*0.94,h); rv.addColorStop(0,'rgba(70,255,235,0.32)'); rv.addColorStop(0.55,'rgba(165,120,255,0.28)'); rv.addColorStop(1,'rgba(95,225,255,0.22)'); ctx.fillStyle=rv; ctx.fill(); for (var i=0;i<38;i++){var tx=(i/37)*w+((i%3)-1)*6,th=18+(i%7)*6,tw=10+(i%4)*2,ty=hz+1+(i%4)*2;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(tx,ty-th);ctx.lineTo(tx-tw,ty);ctx.lineTo(tx+tw,ty);ctx.closePath();ctx.fillStyle=(i%2===0)?'rgba(35,255,220,0.16)':'rgba(220,90,255,0.14)';ctx.fill();} var flakes=state.flakes; glow.addColorStop(0,'hsla('+Math.floor(f.hue)+',100%,85%,'+(a*0.95).toFixed(3)+')'); glow.addColorStop(0.35,'hsla('+Math.floor(f.hue)+',100%,68%,'+(a*0.35).toFixed(3)+')'); glow.addColorStop(1,'hsla('+Math.floor(f.hue)+',100%,55%,0)'); ctx.fillStyle=glow; ctx.fillRect(f.x-r,f.y-r,r*2,r*2); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(f.x,f.y,f.size*0.7,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(240,248,255,'+(a*0.92).toFixed(3)+')'; ctx.fill(); } ctx.restore();
